subscription_pricing_tier.description: Active RevenueCat pricing tier: normal or extreme.

subscription_grace_period_days.description: Extreme-tier grace period. App accepts only 7 or 14.

subscription_extreme_activated_at_ms.description: UTC epoch milliseconds when the current extreme rollout began. Set this when switching the tier to extreme.

subscription_offering_normal_india.description: RevenueCat offering ID for normal pricing in the India storefront.

subscription_offering_normal_internation.description: RevenueCat offering ID for normal pricing outside India.

subscription_offering_extreme_india.description: RevenueCat offering ID for extreme pricing in the India storefront.

subscription_offering_extreme_internatio.description: RevenueCat offering ID for extreme pricing outside India.

subscription_developer_redeem_enabled.description: Allows the server-validated redeem action only when the binary was also compiled with ONE_ONE_BUILD_AUDIENCE=internal. Public binaries ignore this value.

subscription_internal_trial_hours.description: Internal-build extreme-tier trial window in hours. Public binaries ignore this value and hard-gate on entitlement.
